title: Destination Canada Mobility Forum: Events and activities - Canada.ca
content:
## Events and activities
Discover our information sessions, networking events and recruitment
	initiatives targeting French-speaking or bilingual candidates.
- Destination Canada Education
- Destination Canada Mobility Forum

## Destination Canada Education
This virtual job fair is open to French-speaking and bilingual candidates
	with training and experience in the following fields:
- primary and secondary teaching
- early childhood education
We encourage you to visit this page regularly for information on the next
	edition of the Destination Canada Education forum.

## Destination Canada Mobility Forum
The Destination Canada Mobility Forum is an annual event organized by the
	Government of Canada. It helps skilled French-speaking and bilingual candidates
	to
- learn about Canada’s various immigration programs
- expand their network, including with representatives from provinces and
		territories, cities and regions
Francophone organizations devoted to building Canada’s Francophone
	communities will be taking part in the event as well. The Mobility Forum also
	helps candidates connect with Canadian employers looking to fill positions
	outside Quebec.
We encourage you to visit this page regularly for information on the next
	edition of the Destination Canada Mobility Forum.
Subscribe to the Destination
		Canada Mobility Forum newsletter for information about all our activities
	and webinars.
